title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio
original_title: The Prize Winner of Defiance, Ohio
overview: A Midwestern housewife supports her large family by entering contests for ad slogans sponsored by consumer product companies, while dealing with abuse from her alcoholic husband. Based on a true story.
